  • Powered By

    • Why are young people with clarity and energy for regenerative change go marching in the streets holding up placards, only to be attacked with pepper spray in the eyes by corporate-sponsored militia, then beaten and dragged away to jail?
      Buckminster Fuller declared: “You do not change things by fighting against the existing gameworlds. You change things by cavitating and inhabiting new gameworlds that make the existing gameworlds irrelevant.”

      It is the task of the youth to build humanity's new gameworlds. The future is being created at Archiarchy Invention Centers.

      Are you in the AIC train?

    • Archiarchy Invention Centers (AICs)

      AIC VS. UNIVERSITY

      If you attend a university and receive a B.S., M.S., or even Ph.D. degree, what have you done? You have learned to duplicate what is already proven to exterminate life on Earth 100 times faster than when the Chicxulub asteroid crashed into the Yucutan sixty-six-million years ago.

      Even if you are accepted by an Ivy League 'secret society' to join the bank-controlled ranks of both George Bushes and David Cameron, your success merely promotes the outdated Capitalist Patriarchal Empire use of Standard Human Intelligence Thoughtware (S.H.I.T.)

      What other options have you? Try to become a billionaire through BitCoin and trading? Have you met any of these people? Do they engage in anything more than alcohol, gambling, or sex?

      Something completely different from this is possible right now.

      One of its doorways is an Archiarchy Invention Center.

      The fundamental difference between AICs and universities is that AICs don't teach you anything. Instead, they require that you invent a new path for human culture on Earth. It is not about fitting in to an already existing culture, but rather to build out and inhabit a not yet existing culture, a culture that is regenerative.

      Regenerative culture is very different from a green consumption, recycling conscious, sustainable development, electric car culture which aims to optimize shareholder value.

      Regenerative culture is Earth centric, not profit centric.

      Archiarchy Invention Centers are a 'soft landing' platform for when your worldview crashes against reality and you are ready to take Radical Responsibility for using human potentials and group intelligence to invent a regenerative society based on nonmaterial economics.

      Your first new skillset will be learning to Spacehold the invention of new Archiarchy Invention Centers.

      INVITING YOU TO PARTICIPATE IN AICs

      We are opening 3000 gameworld-building Archiarchy Invention Centers (AIC) for tens of thousands of youth from around the world to design and inhabit Humanity 3.0.

      These are non-hierarchical toroidal Teams (circles of circles) thriving in a radical-responsibility context and evolution /transformation purpose, explicitly without any kind of curriculum or controlling board of directors. Rather these AICs start using already existing and readily available new thoughtware resources as a foundation, and then Experiment and Practice from there.

      AICs are not corporate or politicallysponsored ‘think tanks’. These are independent Torus Meeting Technology gameworlds tasked with designing and inhabiting Humanity 3.0: Archiarchy, within a short deadline.

      We could immediately initiate more than 3000 of these future inventing gameworlds for the price of only one of the Emergency Supplemental ‘National Security’ Fundings being sent by the United States of America to Ukraine.

      If something about the AICs puts a tingle down your spine or makes the hair on your arms stand up, please fill in the Registration Form below so we can get back to you. We look forward to hearing from you.

    • Archiarchy Videos

      Different people learn in different ways.

      Some learn better by reading, some learn better by listening.

      Here are videos exploring Archiarchy in the oral tradition.

      Take Your Place In Archiarchy

      A Worktalk:

      Creation is at the center of Archiarchy. It is a complete leap from a Universe of naysaying, complaining, blaming, shaming (also yourself), guilt, defending (yourself), justifiying, loathing, resenting, being in overwhelm, and the complex web of unconscious Fears. When you center the emergence of your Life, and by ripple your culture, around Creation, what transpired from your Being are proposals, ideas, offers, invitations and you learn to negotiate intimacy, say what you want, to Be a Yes for the Creation of other inspired Beings around you.

      It seems that a significant number of Edgeworkers are arriving at this cusp point between the Healing part of the Path and the Creation part of the Path. And if we have been focusing in drawing up the maps for the Healing part, it seems now needed to start drawing up the maps for the Creation part.

      Start Your Archan Gameworld

      A worktalk: There is a spark, dormant in your Being, probably since you were born, telling you things could be different. Things could work better. People could grow up and be supported to deliver more of their awesome potentials. The world could thrive instead of barely survive.
      For your spark to burst into flame, humans need new gameworlds to step into. Certain individuals have the lust to support new kinds of social interactions by building out Archan gameworld infrastructure.

      New skills are required to apply your nonmaterial value in a structure that others can create within. They are waiting for you to build this.
      What are you waiting for? Let us come together and flame on!

      Shift Into Nonmaterial Value

      Archetypal Lineage

      A Worktalk.

      If there is a Team that is design for you to prepare yourself to jack-into your Archetypal Lineage it is the Possibilitator Training. This is the core purpose of that Team. If you are in the PT, and are missing practicing the skills for preparing yourself, then bring these skills into your meeting. If you are not yet in the Possibilitator Training, I recommend you read the website and get in touch with Vera Franco who is the spaceholder for the gameworld.

      Ontree AIC, NZ

      Ontree is an Archiarchy Invention Center (AIC). AICs are not universities, nor churches. The fundamental different is that AICs don't teach you anything. Instead, they require that you invent a new path for human culture on Earth. It is not about fitting in to an already existing culture, but rather to build out and inhabit a not yet existing culture, a culture that is regenerative.
      Ontree is the first permanent land-based Archiarchy Invention Center contexted in Radical Responsibility Possibility Management.

      Ontree is leaping from the edge to build a land-based source of Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes, Nonmaterial Value to unfold and be exchanged and an empowered space for the women to graduate from Patriarchy as Women of Earth.

      At this point, Ontree has completed the the land purchase and they are moving in and getting started.

      Contact them at ontreecentre.org

    • Life At An Archiarchy Invention Center (AIC)

      Inventing regenerative culture includes so many dimensions, yet every facet is important. Each domain is a full-time career path that cannot be learned at any existing University.

      How then do you learn it?

      Through 'synergetic education' and 'temporary community' at an AIC.

      Following is a taster menu of the kinds of challenges you can expect when living with us at an AIC.

      Enter Radical Responsibility

      Archiarchy Invention Centers (AICs) originate in the context of Radical Responsibility. Modern culture originates on Child Level Responsibility. How can you tell the difference? Who cleans up when a child makes a mess? Yes, the adults. Modern culture is making huge messes with no intention at all of ever cleaning them up (deforestation, mineral depletion, peak petroleum, toxic wastes, corporate-controlled governments, subsidies, war, etc.). You enter a new world when you understand the Map Of Possibility and relocate your Point Of Origin to Radical Responsibility. This is the doorway into Archiarchy Invention Centers.

      Radical Responsibility

      Become An Experimenter

      No one can experiment for you.

      More interestingly, no one can stop you from experimenting.

      Experimenting builds Matrix for collecting more consciousness.

      With more consciousness, you see more options to choose from, including the frightening ones.

      What you decide, however, is still up to you.

      Become An Experimenter

      Get Yourself A Beep! Book

      Beep! Book

      Study The 'Map Of Possibility' So You Can Locate Your Minute-By-Minute Actions On The Map

      Map Of Possibility

      Get A Thorough Understanding Of What The Term 'Adulthood' Means In The Archan Language

      Adulthood

      Enter Expansive Learning

      Expansive Learning

      Enter Experiential Reality

      Experiential Reality

      Understand The Current Epochal Culture Shift To Archiarchy

      Archiarchy

      Become Absurdly Effective At Creating High Drama And Differentiating High Drama From Low Drama Moment-By-Moment

      High Drama

      Meet Your 5 Bodies

      5 Bodies

      Learn To Scan For 5 Bodies

      Scanning

      Relocate Yourself To First Position (Centered, Grounded, Bubbled)

      First Position

      Practice Using Your 'Is Glue' and 'Is Glue Dissolver'

      You make your Stories about yourself, about others, about 'the world', and about 'what to do in a world like this with people like them' using 'Is Glue'.

      Luckily you also have 'Is Glue Dissolver' to reinvent any Story you want at any time for no reason.

      Is Glue Dissolver

      Practice Minimizing Your NOW So That It Is Too Small For Stories

      Stories exist in time.

      In NOW there is no time.

      A Minimized NOW is too small for Stories.

      There you get access to Current Reality without any Stories attached.

      This unleashes your Agency.

      Minimize Now

      Go To The Edge Of Modern Culture

      You will know you are at the Edge because you will have two different views.

      One view looks back over your shoulder to see that modern culture is not all there is, even though it markets itself as 'the best thing human beings ever invented'. Modern culture exists behind you, but then, it has an Edge, and you are standing at it.

      The other view is out over the Edge where there is Nothing.

      Staying at the Edge is transformational.

      You could also learn the skills of being a Bridge Builder over the void to Archiarchy.

      Go To The Edge

      Exit The Patriarchy

      You were born into the Capitalist Patriarchal Empire.

      The Patriarchy does not teach about Patriarchy.

      Only you can get yourself out of it.

      Patriarchy

      Quit Participating In Hierarchical Gameworlds

      The Hierarchy

      Psychopath

    • Different Cultures Promote Different Levels Of Responsibility

    • The Context Of Archiarchy Invention Centers (AICs)

      The Space determines what is Possible.

      The Context determines the Space.

      The Spaceholder determines the Context.

      Archiarchy is contexted in Radical Responsibility and centered on Authentic Adulthood Initiatory Processes.

      Anything that is not Regenerative is illegal.

    • Archiarchy Invention Centers (AICs) implement Regenerate Earth Goals (REGs)

    • Catalog Of AICs

      Here are currently existing Archiarchy Invention Centers (AICs) that we have found.

      If you know of additional centers with potential to be an AIC, please let us know.

      Thank you.

      And, welcome!

      (NOTE FOR RESEARCHERS: Our current data for connecting with existing AICs is online here: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1MOsp3V3qIc-oZtD9H8cCjxOQ4cO6nO4IvKuWvZUW2pg/edit?usp=sharing)

      The AICs below are listed by name in alphabetical order.

      ANJOS DO SERTÃO

      Located in Piaui, Brazil.

      Website in Portuguese and English. We speak Portugues and English.

      We stand up for the community, the feeling of resilience, and the soil, co-creating actions with the sum of ancestry, human consciousness, and biological technologies. We want to cultivate a future that belongs to each and every one.

      Call us at: +55 1198 1247 744

      Email: contato at anjosdosertao dot com dot br

      Ask for: Anyone

      anjosdosertao.org.br

      ARCOORA

      Located in New South Wales, Australia.

      Website in English. We speak English

      Arcoora applies best practices in holistic land management and small scale agriculture, transforming the former Vajradhara Gonpa and surrounding land and forest as a training ground for Earth Arts and Village-mindedness. Historically the site has long been identified as a wisdom school and sanctuary for cultural initiations.

      Use contact form at: arcoora.org/contact-us

      arcoora.org

      Bjarkan Resilience Training Center

      Located in northern Sweden.

      Website in English. We speak English and Swedish.

      One hundred and seven wild and remote acres in Northern Sweden - Bjärkan is a resilience project: a place to rediscover our kinship with all beings, regenerate ecosystems and rebuild community.

      Our Bright Principles are Kinship Regeneration Community.

      In August 2024 we offer two weeks of practical tasks, skill-building exercises, relational exploration and nature-based enquiry. We will develop practical tools, transferable skills, and deeper understanding that will leave us all better equipped to navigate an uncertain future together.

      Find us at: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100092646242694

      Email: info at bjarkan dot org

      Ask for: Justine Corrie or Nick Osborne

      bjarkan.org

      BRIDGEHOUSES

      Located around the world. The website is in English, but different languages are spoken in different Bridgehouses. Visit the websites to find out more about individual Bridgehouses.

      Bridgehouse is an Archiarchy life-skills training environment. We are convinced that you have a piece of the puzzle of how to create and inhabit regenerative human cultures on Earth. One purpose of Bridgehouse is to clarify, amplify, and launch your piece of the puzzle as your Nonmaterial Value service to the Village. Another purpose of Bridgehouse is to empower each other to become Spaceholders for creating more Bridgehouses. A further, and perhaps even more fundamental purpose of Bridgehouse has been revealing itself empirically as we gain more experience in Cavitating, Holding, and Navigating Bridgehouse Spaces. This purpose is to 'bridge people out of the Matrix,' using the term 'the matrix' as defined in the film of the same name: The Matrix.

      Contact details: Visit the websites of individual Bridgehouses for their contact details.

      bridgehouse.mystrikingly.com

      CAMP ALTIPLANO

      Located in Spain.

      Website in English. We speak Spanish and English.

      Camp Altiplano envisions a healthy, resilient regional ecosystem made up of a mosaic of productive and biodiverse farms, natural areas, and a regenerated economy.

      Background Info: https://ecosystemrestorationcommunities.org

      Email: info at campaltiplano dot org

      Ask for: Silvia

      facebook.com/ERCAltiplano

      CHUCKLEBERRY COMMUNITY FARM

      Located in southern Canada.

      Website in English. We speak English.

      Chuckleberry is a community of inspired, clear-minded individuals creating a relational-centred, regenerative lifestyle that naturally catalyzes the evolution of human consciousness. We are enabling the old paradigm to fade away without fighting; we are allowing a practical yet magical nature to guide our way. People come to Chuckleberry not just to learn about sustainability and organic food production. Coming to Chuckleberry is an invitation to relax into all of what you are and all of what you feel. In-house workshops and trainings are available to support you on your journey.

      Call us at: +1 250 551 8947 OR +1 250 551 9075

      Email: chuckleberrycommunity at gmail dot com

      Ask for: Brianne Vaillancourt

      chuckleberrycommunity.ca

      ECOCAMP COYOTE

      Located in Silicon Valley, USA.

      Website in English. We speak English.

      We are a hub for proliferation, alternative living, creative reuse, and education. We serve not only our local area, but other Ecosystem Restoration Camps and the environmental movement as a whole. We are a node, facilitating interdependence and permaculture principles as we grow soil, biodiversity and community. We aim to leave this place better than we found it and alleviate any negative impacts on our environment as we educate, demonstrate and liberate the collective.

      Call us at:

      Email:

      Ask for:

      ecocampcoyote.org

      DRYLAND SOLUTIONS COMMUNITY

      Located in Somalia.

      Website in English. We speak Somali, Arabic and English.

      Empowering Communities, Restoring Ecosystems, and Paving the Way for a Sustainable Future. We are Dryland Solutions, dedicated to making a positive impact on Somalia’s environment and communities. Our mission is to rejuvenate ecosystems, empower local
      residents, and foster a harmonious coexistence between nature and humanity. Through innovative solutions and collaborative efforts, we’re on a journey to create lasting change.

      Facebook: facebook.com/DrylandSolutions

      Email: hello at drylandsolutions dot org

      Ask for: Anyone

      drylandsolutionscommunity.org

      GAIAVILLAGE - PART OF OBERION

      Located in Denmark.

      Website in English. We speak Danish and English.

      Welcome to Oberion. Oberion is not an organization. It is a fellowship of seekers. We are all students of life exploring cosmic evolution together. The school is a matrix of possibilities that you can step into, if you choose to join one of the gameworlds of the Oberion. Each gameworld is a project run by fellow students that have been on the path for a while. Like you they are students of the Oberion. They teach while they learn – as will you if you pursue this path. Gaiaville is the garden in which the Oberion Matrix of Possibilities can grow into a Gaiaversity.

      Call Us at: +45 20323120

      Email: info at oberion.com

      Ask for: Aon Solarra

      oberion.com

      GEMEINSCHAFT SCHLOSS GLARISEGG

      Located in Switzerland.

      Website in German. We speak Swiss, German, and English.

      Schloss Glarisegg is an Academy of Community Education. It can seem impossible to be in love with yourself, with all your edges, but also with all your knacks and abilities. The path is so much easier when a community reflects back to you what you cannot see of yourself. It can help you grow into your real size by honestly observing and recognizing your own, sometimes unloved behaviors, as well as experiencing that you don't have to be perfect to be loved.

      Facebook: facebook.com/profile.php?id=100000351365205

      Email: ademie at schloss dash glarisegg dot ch

      Ask for: Kathrin Jehle

      schloss-glarisegg.ch/gemeinschaft-3

      HABIBA COMMUNITY

      Located in Egypt.

      Website in English. We speak English and Arabic.

      Welcome to Habiba Community—joined by our beach lodge, regenerative & organic farms and learning center. Our vision lies in cultivating our desert through ecology and knowledge to build a strong, healthy & sustainable future for the entire South Sinai Community.

      Call us at: +20 109 111 3835

      Facebook: facebook.com/habiba.organic.farm

      Email: hof at habibacommunity dot com

      Ask for: Yousef

      habibacommunity.com

      HINEWAI RESERVE

      Located in New Zealand.

      Website in English. We speak English.

      The primary aim is to foster the natural regeneration of native vegetation and wildlife. We operate under a management strategy of minimal interference — that is, we allow natural succession to run its course towards a vegetation cover (nearly all forest) similar to that prevailing before the forest clearance by human settlers. A secondary goal is to allow the visiting public to enjoy the reserve through the provision and maintenance of a walking track network.

      Note, Hinewai does not have a volunteer programme but is open to visitors.

      Email: hinewaireserve at gmail dot com

      Ask for: Hugh Wilson

      hinewai.org.nz

      HUMBLE HABITAT - BIOTOPBYGGARNA

      Located in Sweden.

      Website in Swedish. We speak Swedish and English.

      We are an association that, through member activities, wishes to increase knowledge about ecosystem restoration and contribute practically to building healthy biotopes, to everyone's benefit. Our goal is to promote considerate approaches to nature and biodiversity, and to highlight the methods in landscape management that enable us to act regeneratively instead of destructively.

      Call us at: +46 730647462

      Email: kontakt at roxproductions dot se

      Ask for: David Roxendal

      biotopbyggarna.se

      INLA KESH

      Located in Chiapas, Mexico.

      Website in Spanish, English, and German. We speak Spanish, English, and German.

      Inla Kesh is a land-based NanoNation and community which is co-inventing a new culture in the context of radical responsibility.

      The purpose of our community is to investigate and to train each other so we and the people in connection with us can live out their full potential. We want to serve Gaia and human beings with all our discoveries.

      Our intention is to live in connection with the earth and create new, regenerative ways of living in and with nature, thereby creating human supportive ecosystems. By going into spaces of intimacy with each other we are finding clarity on how to deal with key human issues such as spirituality, sexuality, money and living in a rapidly changing environment.

      Central to our culture is the expansion of consciousness in everyday life and letting Love, Evolution, Integrity, Transformation and Community come through us into space.

      Call us at: +52 967 191 9865

      Email: info at inlakeshchiapas at org

      Ask for: Anyone

      chiapasinlakesh.wixsite.com/misitio

      NEOT SEMEDAR

      Website in English and Hebrew. We speak English and Hebrew.

      Kibbutz Neot Semadar is located in the Southern Negev Desert of Israel, about
      60km north of Eilat. The Kibbutz was established in 1989 by a group of
      friends interested in creating a learning community that focuses on
      cooperation and creativity in daily life. As individuals in a dynamic
      community, we explore what it means to live together as co-learners,
      observing ourselves in everyday activities and relationships. Our
      interest in relationship extends to the environment through organic
      farming, desert architecture, water recycling, The Art Center and more.
      Today there are 90 adult members (families and singles), 70 children of
      various ages, and about 50 volunteers of all ages. These volunteers,
      from Israel and from abroad,come to Neot Semadar to find a fresh and
      independent perspective on life.
      Call us at: +972 54 9798433

      Email: rooms at neot dash semadar dot com

      Ask for: Anyone

      neot-semadar.com

      ONTREE CENTRE

      Located in New Zealand

      Website in English. We speak English, German, and Spanish.

      Welcome to the Ontree Centre, the 'organic-magic' kitchen where we co-create Trainings, Research, and Gaian Gameworlds! Here is where the fruits of collaborative research into Archiarchy in Aotearoa (New Zealand) are shared abundantly, dropping seeds of Possibility and Transformation on the fertile forest floor.

      Call us at: +64 20 4087 7083

      Email: ontreecentre at gmail dot com

      Ask for: Ana Norambuena

      ontreecentre.org

      OSADA.EARTH

      Located in Poland.

      Website is in English and Polish. We speak English and Polish.

      We are living in a time of deepening poly-crisis, possibly leading to the collapse of the world as we know it and the destruction of present life on Earth. Our task is to hospice modernity and sow the seeds of a mature culture for future generations. At OSADA we strive to do it wisely and courageously. We gather with the urgency of being alive - here and now. We serve as a beacon and a safe harbour for those who want to be with the challenges of our confused modern age. We seek to patiently ask good questions and avoid hasty responses and answers. We live together striving to create a regenerative socio-economic model, growing up together and working for a truly interconnected life. In everyday life, we practice and discover elements of regenerative culture. We share our discoveries. We create an edible forest, garden and water retention system. We work physically, serving the community and regenerating the ecosystem. We work closely with the individuals and organizations from the municipality, the district and the Drawsko Lake region. We are discovering our role in the bioregion of the Drava river basin. We support the Polish and international community of people and projects taking up the challenges of the time of socio-environmental polycrisis. We operate in an international ecosystem of projects and places pursuing a similar vision.

      Call us at: +48 791742387

      Email: osada at osada dot earth

      Ask for: Maciek Antkowiak

      osada.earth

      Pulse der Erde

      Located east of Munich in Germany.

      Website is in German. We speak German and English.

      Puls der Erde e.V. - Gemeinschaft zur Erforschung und Verbreitung nachhaltiger Lebensweisen. We plant seeds for the next generation to harvest.

      • Seminars on permaculture, deep ecology, connection to nature, self-sufficiency, ancient crafts, etc.
      • Development of regenerative agricultural methods.
      • Intercultural events.
      • Regional networking with like-minded individuals and non-profit organizations.
      • Awareness-raising through lectures and workshops.

      Call us at: +49 86309868648

      Email: s dot willaredt at posteo dot de

      Ask for: Sonia Willaredt (speaks German and English)

      pulsdererde.org

      SCHOOL OF LOST BORDERS

      Located in northern California, USA.

      Website in English. We speak English.

      For over 40 years, the School of Lost Borders has provided vision fasts, guide trainings, and other programs that offer initiatory, transformational experiences to those seeking
      growth, insight, and restoration. Our participants are of various ages,
      lifestyles, and cultures.

      Call us at: +1 760-938-3333

      Email: school at lostborders dot org

      Ask for: Anyone

      schooloflostborders.org

      SEEDS OF THE NEW EARTH

      Located near Gramado in Brazil

      Website in Portuguese. We speak English and Portuguese.

      An evolutionary community of rapid learning building in practice a Village
      of the New Earth. A village of radical collaboration between
      individuals, and radical love responsibility with life in the village:
      children, animals, nature, spirits and visitors. Where in these 3 months
      we will distill and invent a fertile soil internal and external to
      flourish the best of the potential of each member of the Village. All of
      this are documented in one or more documentaries that share the
      discoveries, challenges, and experience with the world.

      Call us at: +55 11 97210 2005

      Email: israelkairosoficial at gmail dot com

      SÍTIO BRÍGIDA

      Located near Anitapolis, Brazil, 2.5 hours from Florianopolis.

      Website in Portuguese and English. We speak English, German, and Portuguese.

      Sítio Brígida is a space for honoring and dignifying ways of relating- to each other and the world around us. This is an alive space where we meet each other authentically, in a circle. Surrounded by nature and 5.6 hectar, this space is to explore and rediscover human nature - alongside nature beings, animals, plants and the wisdom of Earth.

      At Sítio Brígida, you are invited to uncover your unique path of evoution and reclaim your inner authority. The space is to uncover your inner gifts - to be a guardian who contributes to the Earth and the regenation of Gaia.

      Call us at: +55 13 99745 1062

      Email: isabelamarilis at posteo dot de

      Ask for: Isabel Esterl

      SOMOS

      Located on Tenerife Island, Spain.

      Website is in Spanish and English. We speak Spanish, English, and German.

      SOMOS is a research and experiment center creating a way of living that is centred on creation, aliveness and evolution. Powered by Possibility Management.

      We offer Aridani: a 5-week adventure where inner and outer regeneration meet building cob structures, planting a food forest, crafting a greywater system, filming a documentary. AND whatever else you bring to the party. We are a village, not a program.

      Somos is a held space with regular experiments, processes, practices and initiations designed to amplify and launch your seeds, as well as a place to create your own processes, offerings and spaces with support from your Team.

      Call us at: +34 605757469

      Email: somosregeneration at gmail dot com

      somos.land/en

      SPIREBO DROPOUT COMMUNITY

      Located in Bulgaria (currently).

      Website in German, English, French, Spanish, Bulgarian. We speak German, English, French, Spanish and Bulgarian

      A nomadic patchwork family tribe roaming earth’s land and seas learning and sharing a huge wealth of non-material value in community living, regenerative food culture (garden, fields and livestock breeding), building culture and travel culture.

      They settled 2023 in the untouched mountain nature of the Balkan area in Bulgaria in order to continue their life, together striving for a self sufficient and self-determined living amongst their spiritual consultant who founded the spiritual tribe 2006 in Germany.

      Email: auftour spirebo dot com

      Ask for: Tamara

      spirebo.com

      TAMERA

      Located in Portugal.

      Website in English, German or Portuguese. We speak English, Portuguese, Spanish and German.

      Our vision and Mission is to birth Terra Nova – a world beyond war – by building Healing Biotopes: futuristic centers that research and model a new planetary culture.

      We empower people around the world to build a regenerative, nonviolent culture by:

      • Researching the ethical, social, sexual, ecological, technological and economic foundations, and creating a replicable model in Tamera.
      • Training and supporting those committed to the Healing Biotopes Plan
      • Building a planetary community and sharing our vision of Terra Nova.

      Call us at: +351 283 635 209

      Email: grace dot associacao at tamera dot org

      Ask for: Anyone

      tamera.org

      TUI COMMUNITY

      Tui Community is located in Wainui Bay, Golden Bay, in the North-West of the South Island of Aotearoa. Original members established Tui in 1984 after purchasing 50 hectares of farmland on the edge of the Abel Tasman National Park. Their aim was to create an intentional community. As a community living together, we are seeking wholeness through fulfilling relationships with ourselves, each other, and the planet. Over the years, our community, people, and processes have evolved - and we are open to you finding out more about us.

      Email: visitors at tuitrust dot org dot nz

      Ask for: Anyone

      tuitrust.org.nz

      WOMEN OF EARTH BRIDGEHOUSE

      Located in Brazil.

      Website in English. We speak English, French, and Portuguese.

      The Woman Of Earth Bridgehouse is dedicated to researching, developing and embodying Archiarchy life-skills for Women, for the purpose of training each Woman to become a Dignified and Arrogant Spaceholder for Archiarchy, in a co-living, training and research space, otherwise called: Bridgehouse. The Women Of Earth Bridgehouse is a live-in, train-in environment for Women to authentically grow up and become Spaceholders for Archiarchy to effectively emerge and unfold so it can be inhabited by each of the Archan Specialities. It is evident that for Archiarchy to unfold and be inhabited Archiarchy Spaceholders are required. Since the legendary first Women Of Earth Possibility Lab in Portugal in 2023 with Trainers Anne-Chloé Destremau and Vera Luísa Franco, it became clear that those Spaceholders are Archetypally Initiated Women.

      Call us at: +44 7748934374

      Email: veralfranco gmail dot com

      Ask for: Vera Luísa Franco

      womenofearthbridge-house.mystrikingly.com

      YANANTIN

      Yanantin is an archiarchy invention centre embedded in the abundant nature of Xico, Veracruz, México.

      It is a village for the evolution of human consciousness and the creative collaboration between the authentically initiated Feminine and the authentically initiated Masculine.

      It is an evolutionary team grounded in radical responsibility, where each person takes ownership of their reality and creations.

      In Yanantin, we raise children in village, we heal and empower, experiment and create.

      Together we are weaving a regenerative culture — uniting ancestral wisdom with modern discovery, in harmony with Gaia and all her beings.

      Ask for: Selina Frei or David Castro Hernandez

      yanantin-village.earth

      ZEGG COMMUNITY

      Located near Berlin in northern Germany.

      Website in German. We speak German and English.

      ZEGG is a cultural laboratory. Living in community serves as a laboratory in which the foundations of an authentic, sustainable and cooperative culture are developed and lived. Transforming community is our way, not the goal. As a political project, we want to change society and develop knowledge, experience and structures. Every real cultural shift begins inside, in the healing of the mental injuries and traumas and the discovery of the metaconscious authentic core in us. 'Inner-world crisis' and environmental crisis are two sides of the same coin.

      Call us at: +49 33841 595 100

      Email: empfang at zegg dot de

      Ask for: Anyone

      zegg-gemeinschaft.de
